ddls:
CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the expense was incurred */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month in which the expense was incurred */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year in which the expense was incurred */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region where the expense occurred */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Main category of the expense (e.g., Travel) */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Subcategory of the expense (e.g., Hotels) */,
  "cost_center_id" INTEGER /* Cost center associated with the expense */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Employee who incurred the expense */,
  "expense_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the expense */,
  "in_policy_expense" REAL /* Amount of expense that is in compliance with policy */,
  "out_of_policy_expense" REAL /* Amount of expense that is out of compliance with policy */,
  "budget" REAL /* Allocated budget for the expense category */,
  "previous_year_amount" REAL /* Amount spent in the previous year for comparison */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the expense */,
  "expense_date" TEXT /* Exact date of the expense */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense */,
  "receipt_image" TEXT /* Image of the receipt */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the expense */,
  "reimbursement_status" TEXT /* Reimbursement status of the expense */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_cost_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_center_id") REFERENCES cost_centers ("cost_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense category (e.g., Travel) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID for hierarchical categories */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense subcategory (e.g., Hotels) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the main category of the expense */,
  "parent_subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Parent subcategory ID for hierarchical subcategories */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the subcategory is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., UK, USA) */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code for the region */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the region is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_centers" (
  "cost_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost center */,
  "cost_center_name" TEXT /* Name of the cost center */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department associated with the cost center */,
  "parent_cost_center_id" INTEGER /* Parent cost center ID for hierarchical cost centers */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cost center is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget record */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding category */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the budget is allocated */,
  "allocated_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for that category in the specified year */,
  "cost_center_id" INTEGER /* Cost center associated with the budget */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the budget */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the budget is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_cost_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_center_id") REFERENCES cost_centers ("cost_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the organization */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "approval_logs" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval record */,
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the expense record being approved */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who approved the expense */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the approval (e.g., Approved, Rejected) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date of the approval decision */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the approval */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the approval log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the approval log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approval_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approval_logs_expense_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_id") REFERENCES expenses ("expense_id")
)
